Interior Plaster in Lee County, TX

Star Stucco of Austin brings interior plaster services to Lee County homeowners in Giddings, Lexington, and the surrounding rural communities. Our team provides handcrafted wall finishes that bring warmth, texture, and lasting quality to homes throughout this part of Central Texas.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Handcrafted Plaster Walls for Lee County Properties

Lee County is a rural community where German, Czech, and Wendish settlers left a lasting mark on the built environment. The area's older homes and churches feature original plaster walls that speak to a tradition of careful craftsmanship — a tradition we carry forward with every project. Whether you are restoring a historic farmhouse or finishing a new home, interior plaster brings that same level of quality to your walls.

Giddings, as the county seat, has a mix of historic buildings and newer residential development. Homes on the older streets near downtown often have plaster-over-lath construction that needs skilled repair, while newer homes on the outskirts benefit from the upgraded feel that a smooth skim coat or decorative plaster accent provides.

We travel to Lee County regularly and understand that rural properties sometimes present unique conditions — well water, variable substrates, and older construction methods among them. We adapt our materials and techniques to suit the specific challenges of each job.

What's Included With Our Interior Plaster in Lee County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Design Consultation

We visit your Lee County property to inspect wall conditions, discuss your goals, and share samples of available plaster finishes. You receive a written scope and estimate before we begin.

Surface Preparation

All walls are repaired, cleaned, and primed. We protect flooring, woodwork, and furnishings with drop cloths and masking before plaster application starts.

Base Coat Application

A bonding base coat matched to your substrate is applied across each surface, creating the stable foundation that the decorative finish requires.

Decorative Finish Application

Finish plaster is hand-applied with trowels in one or more passes. The technique and number of layers depend on the finish you selected during the consultation.

Color Matching & Tinting

Pigments are blended into the plaster for integral, long-lasting color. We can match existing surfaces or create new tones that complement your home's interior.

Protective Sealing & Cleanup

A protective sealer is applied to the cured plaster. All masking is removed, and we leave the space clean and ready for everyday use.

Common Interior Plaster Needs in Lee County

Lee County homeowners come to us for projects that reflect the area's mix of historic homes and newer construction. Here are the services we provide most frequently.

Smooth Wall Finishes

A smooth skim coat is one of the most requested services in Lee County, replacing outdated spray textures with a clean, flat surface that makes rooms feel refreshed and modern.

Decorative Plaster Accents

Accent walls in living rooms, around fireplaces, and in dining areas add visual interest and a handcrafted touch that sets Lee County homes apart from standard drywall construction.

Venetian Plaster

The polished, luminous quality of Venetian plaster adds sophistication to formal living spaces in both newer custom homes and renovated farmhouses across Lee County.

Interior Wall Restoration

Many of Lee County's older homes and historic buildings have original plaster walls that have developed cracks, soft spots, or moisture damage over the decades. We repair and restore these surfaces with care.

Custom Textures for Feature Walls

From soft hand-troweled patterns to earthy, adobe-inspired surfaces, we create custom feature walls that bring personality to bedrooms, home offices, and gathering spaces.

Skim Coating Over Textured Walls

Lee County homeowners updating their interiors frequently start with a skim coat to eliminate heavy textures and create a smooth, contemporary foundation for paint or further finishing.

Why Choose Us for Interior Plaster in Lee County?

  • Artisan plastering skills with respect for the building traditions that shaped Lee County's historic homes
  • Full selection of finishes from smooth skim coats to layered Venetian and lime-based plasters
  • Color matching expertise that ensures plaster walls integrate with your home's existing design
  • Clean, organized work practices that keep your home protected and livable during the project
  • Thorough attention to every edge, corner, and detail for a professional, finished look
  • Adaptable solutions for the range of home styles and wall conditions found across Lee County

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Lee County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Interior Plaster Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Design Consultation

We travel to your Lee County home to review wall conditions, discuss your design preferences, and present physical samples of the plaster finishes we offer.

2

Surface Preparation & Priming

All walls are repaired and primed. For older homes in Giddings and Lexington, we assess existing plaster or lath conditions and plan the appropriate preparation.

3

Plaster Application & Finishing

Base and finish coats are applied in sequence, with each layer contributing to the final texture. Our team monitors drying conditions to ensure proper curing.

4

Final Review & Touch-Ups

We walk through the finished project with you, checking each surface for consistency and quality. Touch-ups are completed and sealer is applied before the project is closed.
